title: 神戸新聞杯の後に・勝負の予感

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen's attempt in the Kobe Shimbun
Hai ends in success.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next challenge is the Kikuka Sho, the final
race of the Classics. Winning this one is necessary
if she's to go on and participate in the Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan is likely to be running as well. The
thought of a showdown against her big sister fills
Mejiro McQueen with vigor.
